version_description: Multiple different chords added to match the song better.

versions.version_description: Credit to "Easy 2 Play Guitar Tutorials" on Youtube, just thought it woul dbe helpful to have the tab on here instead of just on Youtube.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=L7mfjvdnPno

[Intro]
[ch]F[/ch] [ch]E7[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]E7[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]


[Chorus]
[tab]   [ch]F[/ch]                        [ch]E7[/ch]
My last made me feel like I would never try again[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am7[/ch]                    [ch]Em/G[/ch]
But when I saw you, I felt something I never felt[/tab]

[tab]       [ch]Am7[/ch]                          [ch]CM7/G[/ch]

[Verse]
[tab] [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]E7[/ch]                   [ch]Am7[/ch]             [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
Talk to me, I need to hear you need me like I need ya[/tab]

[tab]                     [ch]Am7[/ch]
Speeding fast on the run, never want to get caught up[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                        [ch]F[/ch]
Now you the one that I'm calling[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]E7[/ch]                         [ch]Am7[/ch]
Swore that I'd never forget, don't think I'm just talking[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                             [ch]F[/ch]
I think I might go all in, no exceptions, girl, I need ya[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                              [ch]E7[/ch]                      [ch]Am7[/ch]

[tab]                             [ch]Em/G[/ch]
Only one that I give my time, 'cause I got time for ya[/tab]

Might make an exception for ya, 'cause I been feeling ya[/tab]
